Polymarket Vows to Fight France Geoblock Ban in Court
CasinoBeats
2026-07-23
The prediction market operator Polymarket says it will fight a ban imposed by the National Gaming Authority (ANJ) of France earlier this month, calling the regulator’s move “surprising.” Polymarket stopped accepting transactions from France in November 2024, but continued to allow French IP addresses to access the site. The ANJ and others claimed this encouraged […] The post Polymarket Vows to Fight France Geoblock Ban in Court appeared first on CasinoBeats .

2026-07-23
Macao casinos have vowed to crack down on illegal proxy betting as police continue to arrest Mainland Chinese patrons who secretly livestream baccarat games for remote gamblers. Executives from Macao’s six concession-holding casinos held an emergency meeting with the regulator, the Macau Gaming Supervision and Coordination Bureau (DICJ), last week to discuss a coordinated response. Shandong Taishan, of China’s Super League, filed a complaint against Son at the Court of Arbitration for Sport (CAS), with a hearing slated for August 11.
